name: Warm Tortellini Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (9 oz each) fresh cheese - tortellini
1/2 lb Havarti cheese, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
Half of a 7 1/4 oz jar roasted red peppers, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
1. Cook the tortellini in a large pot of boiling water according to the package directions. Add the broccoli for the last 5 minutes of cooking.
2. Combine cheese, peppers, and dressing in a bowl.
3. Drain pasta and broccoli, then add them to the cheese mixture with the peppers.
